blocks.content: It was a shock that made all the users fighting in the Solar War stop.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The Operator…
Shirone's hand, which had pierced her chest, was sticking out of her back.
An unmistakable fatal wound.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Ugh.
As he pulled his arm out, electricity flowed through the Operator's body as she staggered forward.
Gritting her teeth and lifting her head, her machine exploded with a pop.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: She's dead.
The effect was no different from any other user, but somehow it seemed more brilliant.
In the unprecedented event in High Gear history, users even felt fear.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: What should they do now?
As no one could provide direction, Shirone turned to the East Country and shouted.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Let's go!
As if drawn by a magnet, East Country users cheered.

blocks.speaker: East Country soldiers
blocks.content: We defeated the Operator! She's not invincible! Now begins the era of the East Country!
As East Country soldiers activated their turbos, the previously balanced front line pushed back 300 meters in an instant.

blocks.speaker: Yolga's son
blocks.content: It"s all about momentum.
Their excitement was at its peak, and they were eager to fight immediately.

blocks.speaker: Aegis
blocks.content: Should we control them? If they push too hard, there might be delays later.

blocks.speaker: Aegis
blocks.content: Leave them. We can't control this anyway.
They had marked a loss on the strongest machine in High Gear.
Conversely, creating this level of momentum is something only Yahweh2 could do.
Draw East Country forces to key strategic points. Just holding those will be beneficial.

blocks.speaker: Aegis
blocks.content: Understood.
Fermi looked at Little Witch.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: Are you going to continue?

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: Defeating the Operator in a duel, the condition is cleared. Does Yahweh2 have anything left?

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: He does.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: You know what kind of guy he is.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: If it was just about achieving results, he wouldn't have left any room for the Operator.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: He won't give up until he's satisfied. So we have to keep going.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: Excellent after-service. Truly a big company.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: …The customer is picky.
From Golden Wheel's perspective, Shirone was the most troublesome customer.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Haha, but you still want to catch him.
Without answering, Fermi activated his booster and flew up.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: Let's make it interesting. The East Country will win.
As he headed to the East Country's base, Little Witch also turned towards the Solar Palace.

blocks.speaker: Little Witch
blocks.content: Hmm.
She was curious about the Operator's face.
Operator's Meeting Room
The Operator's death was shocking not only to users but also to the operators.

blocks.speaker: Smile Mark
blocks.content: …She lost?
Messages arriving individually to operators exploded on the shared channel.

blocks.speaker: Smile Mark
blocks.content: Ugh! That scared me. What's going on?

blocks.speaker: Candy Cane Mark
blocks.content: The forum is going wild. Users are posting videos of the Operator's death.
Checking the forum, they saw videos pouring in like a waterfall.

blocks.speaker: Candy Cane Mark
blocks.content: Title: Operator Dead! The first post already has over 7,000 views.

blocks.speaker: Gear Mark
blocks.content: That shows how shocking it is. Honestly, I didn't think the Operator would lose either.

blocks.speaker: Gear Mark
blocks.content: About that, Yahweh2's double jump through codes at the end is strange. It's like knowing the location of the second door before even opening the first.

blocks.speaker: Gear Mark
blocks.content: Hmm, that's not something a guest can do.

blocks.speaker: Gear Mark
blocks.content: Right. Only the homeowner knows all the door locations. This is clearly a host's authority.
The Operator is also a host. Even in a surprise situation, it shouldn't have been unpredictable.

blocks.speaker: Gear Mark
blocks.content: Looking at the logs, there's a moment of stiffness. After all, she's human. The problem is Yahweh2. His senses have risen to a level that can no longer be called personal.
The meeting room fell silent.

blocks.speaker: Black Circle Mark
blocks.content: Look at this.
Black Circle Mark opened a window.

blocks.speaker: Black Circle Mark
blocks.content: This is Yahweh2's current movement.
What they saw was not an image but a rush of countless codes, making it even more shocking.

blocks.speaker: Smile Mark
blocks.content: The code…

blocks.speaker: Gear Mark
blocks.content: As Yahweh2's code changed, the entire code was changing in real-time.

blocks.speaker: Gear Mark
blocks.content: It had a strange texture, like a convex lens moving on the screen.

blocks.speaker: Smile Mark
blocks.content: How is this possible? Can one user change external codes at will?

blocks.speaker: Gear Mark
blocks.content: He's not changing them.

blocks.speaker: Gear Mark
blocks.content: It's not artificial manipulation. The code is automatically redefined to match Yahweh2's changes.

blocks.speaker: Demon Mark
blocks.content: Because it moves with the system, the balance doesn't break?

blocks.speaker: Candy Cane Mark
blocks.content: Yes. Yahweh2's status isn't changing drastically. It's likely the system's limit to handle Yahweh2's vibrations.

blocks.speaker: Black Circle Mark
blocks.content: Hmm, if it's not something you can understand with your head, then it's right to see it as perfectly assimilated. Like resonance, moving together.
In the end, High Gear is safe. It's not an error. But the host's authority has already been surpassed, and the Operator lost in the inflation. So, what do we do now?
As silence continued, someone shrieked.

blocks.speaker: Someone
blocks.content: Where on earth is Number Seven?
Solar Palace
Ascension Guild, holding the primary defense authority, resurrects at the Solar Palace upon death.
After 20 minutes of rapid charging, Mid Gear opened, and the Operator slowly opened her eyes.
Everything looked unfamiliar.

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: Even as she reached the solar furnace where Low Gear was, she didn't open the communication channel.

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: I died.
Checking the satellite video, she saw East Country forces charging towards the Solar Palace.

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: It's still okay.

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: With the ebb and flow, it was normal to gradually approach the Solar Palace.
Kneeling quietly before Low Gear, the Operator surveyed the battlefield.

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: Nothing registered in her mind.

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: Hah!
She stretched out her legs and lay flat on her back, having straightened her bent knees.

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: What should I do?

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: She had truly died.

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: Leaving aside her promise with Yahweh2, she now had no world to escape to.

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: This was everything.

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: She had believed that dying even once would be the end, making High Gear her reality.

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: But on the other hand…

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: What's changed?

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: She saw herself, having revived perfectly, thinking about various things.

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: Haha! Hahaha!

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: It was ridiculous.

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: Yeah, I know. I know too. There's no such thing as a real world anywhere.

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: She was just…

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: Afraid to throw her heart into it.

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: Yahweh2.
She watched Yahweh2 fighting the West Country's strong users through the satellite screen.

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: Huh? It's Tiger?

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: The third-ranked duelist in the West Country.

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: A skilled user with a cobalt-blue machine and powerful claws.

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: He's pretty good.

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: I once invited him to our guild…

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: Recalling that time, a massive flash from Michelangelo struck Tiger directly.

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: It was a bit lacking. Michelangelo's power seems to have dropped. Has he been fighting continuously?

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: As expected, Tiger, with one arm blown off, charged at Yahweh2's back.

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: Oh, Air God.
The air bullet from Air God, equipped on Shirone's left arm, struck Tiger.

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: Ignoring durability. A great choice. But the base damage is fixed at 10.

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: Even if hit by Michelangelo, it would take hundreds of shots to destroy one piece of armor.

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: Reload. He'll never run out of bullets. Wasn't the motif someone named Gaold?

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: It was a vivid dream.
Yahweh2 continued to accumulate damage on Tiger's armor while jumping through codes.

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: That was annoying. Of course, it won't happen twice. I was just scared then.
Tiger's machine exploded.

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: He's really good.

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: Though an enemy, Yahweh2's skill had improved so much that she couldn't help but praise him aloud.

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: No one can catch him. Except maybe me…

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: Her voice trailed off.

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: I want to do it again.

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: She wanted to smell the gunpowder with countless users in the world of High Gear.

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: One win, one loss.

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: Ah, I see.
Sitting up abruptly, the Operator smiled and opened the communication channel.

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: One win, one loss.

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: Hey! What are you doing with the communication off? Can't you see we're losing the Solar War? What should we do?

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: Oh! The boss is back! Don't get discouraged just because you died once! We just need to win the Solar War!
As she opened all the doors of the Solar Palace, all sorts of loud noises rushed in.

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: West Country first team, gather at the Solar Palace!

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: We'll lure the East Country in and then take them down! That's our comeback!

blocks.speaker: East Country soldiers
blocks.content: Okay! Sounds good!

blocks.speaker: Aegis
blocks.content: Quickly grasping the West Country's change, Aegis communicated with Yolga's son.

blocks.speaker: Aegis
blocks.content: They're luring us. What should we do?

blocks.speaker: Yolga's son
blocks.content: They plan to pick off the rankers. It's a good strategy, but not as easy as it sounds.

blocks.speaker: Yolga's son
blocks.content: Golden Wheel is full of professionals. In terms of ranker skill, we surpass the West Country.

blocks.speaker: Yolga's son
blocks.content: That's why the West Country was taking a gamble.

blocks.speaker: Yolga's son
blocks.content: They're coming out strong. They must be confident they can take Yahweh2. Let's match them. Let's go in.

blocks.speaker: Yolga's son
blocks.content: But just going along with it…

blocks.speaker: Yolga's son
blocks.content: It's after-service.

blocks.speaker: Aegis
blocks.content: Aegis immediately nodded.
Watching the East Country's first team head to the Solar Palace, Fermi chuckled.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: Is it the burning heart of a teenage girl?
Anyway.
Six hours into the Solar War. Leaving the battlefield behind, the top rankers clashed inside the Solar Palace.
The East Country had the upper hand in skill, but the West Country had the home ground advantage.
We can't go for a long battle. The West Country's reinforcement speed is twice that of the East Country. 20 minutes or 40 minutes. If it goes beyond that, we'll fall behind in utilizing delays.
As Yolga's son and Little Witch fought fiercely, the Operator charged in.

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: Yahweh2!
Having already cut down 13 rankers, the Operator raised her black sword towards Shirone.

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: This is the end.
From the moment they lured the enemy into the Solar Palace, the West Country had also committed fully.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: Hey, it's happening.
With all eyes in High Gear focused, Yahweh2 and the Operator collided.

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: Ugh!
With a head-on physical attack, Yahweh2's machine was pushed back at a terrifying speed.
The shadows that broke through the wall split into two and then collided again at incredible speed.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: Wow.
Host level.
Golden flashes shone, and the black magnetic field sphere deflected and spun them.
Bang! Bang! Bang! Bang!
Fist against fist, firepower against firepower, output against output, everything collided.

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: She's really strong.

blocks.speaker: Yahweh2
blocks.content: I…

blocks.speaker: The Operator
blocks.content: You…
Activating Da Vinci, Shirone thrust his right arm, covered in strong armor, at terrifying speed.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Lost.
The Operator.
Her bangs were blown back by the wind pressure, and his fist pierced her chest with a thud.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: How is it, Yahweh2?
Users in front of the big screen stared intently at her revealed face for the first time.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: High Gear, isn't it fun?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Yes. It's really fun.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Hehe.
Her smiling face looked much younger than expected…

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I knew it.
She looked like an ordinary girl.
